profile.tagline: Full-stack dev passionate about AI, automation, and aerial drone footage.

hero.stack: Vue · React · Kotlin · C# · Drone · Video

about.title: About me
about.bio1: Italian software developer with a full-stack mindset and a genuine curiosity for everything tech. Frontend with Vue, React and Angular, backend with C# and Kotlin — plus React Native when the project calls for it. Passionate about AI, automations, Raspberry Pi tinkering, and anything that can be taken apart and put back together better.
about.bio2: On the creative side: video editing, color grading and aerial drone footage. When I'm not writing code, I'm probably cutting a video or flying somewhere.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's talk.
